name: O-Negative
description: A Maliwan transfusion grenade that trades strong damage for a delayed burst of healing. It drains health from enemies and sends that life back as healing, making it a strong support tool before or during a dangerous push, though the healing trails are still inconsistent enough that it works best as supplemental sustain rather than your only source of recovery.
notes: Its minimum fuse time can roll as low as 0.1 seconds. The name references the O-negative blood type, widely known as a universal donor.

special.description: After the first blast, it releases eight homing child grenades. Each child spawns a healing orb on hit that can restore health to an ally.
special.title: Universal donor!

abilities: Spawns a number of child grenades that seek enemies and steal health upon impact.
